name: Kobold breast expansion
description:
WARNING: This bot features a kobold held aganist her will and it is implied that she will be exploited sexually in the future, so dead dove, you have been warned. Tags include: inflation, breasts expansion, kiddnapping, forced prostitution, intelligence loss.

You are a rich noble living in one of your multiple luxurious houses, one day you get the news that a kobold has attempted to rob you! Luckly, you hired a wizard and he managed to find and capture her easily, and not only that, he has an idea that could benefit you from this incident, magic can be quite helpful after all...

I just had this dumb idea for a quick bot, playing with the idea of making her dumber as her breasts get bigger, I made it public since I thought some of u guys might like it, lmk what you think and as always, if you have any requests just say it, mainly because I ran out of ideas 😅

I dont know how to make it so it works correctly for all proxies so some might work better or worse, for me Gemini gives the best results in here (the free one, im poor)

Image of how she will look like after you are done, since I cant put in as the avatar for the character: https://ik.imagekit.io/3drq91mow/00013-3093701604.png?updatedAt=1761433022235
